mappings.rationaleAI: Comprehensive anatomy covering cardiovascular (A), lymphatic (B), respiratory (C), digestive (D), reproductive (F), skeletal (H), body cavities (I), and nervous systems (J.1, J.2).
Physiological mechanisms address cardiovascular (A), respiratory (C), digestive (D), endocrine (E), reproductive (F), excretory (G), and nervous system functions (J).
Neuroanatomy addresses central (J.1), peripheral (J.2), and autonomic nervous systems (J.3).

Endocrine physiology addresses thyroid (E.1.a), adrenals (E.1.b), pituitary (E.1.c), hypothalamus (E.1.d), pancreatic islets (E.1.e), and reproductive endocrinology (E.2).

Olfactory physiology addresses the smell sense (J.6.e).

Nervous system formation addresses central nervous system structure (J.1).

Action potentials and sympathetic responses address peripheral (J.2) and autonomic nervous systems (J.3).
